title: It Can't Happen Here
description: It Can't Happen Here is a semi-satirical American political novel published in 1935.  It's Plot centers around newspaperman Doremus Jessup's struggle against the fascist regime of America' new president, Berzelius "Buzz" Windrip.  Windripis elected on a platform promising to restore prosperity and $5,000 a year for all citizens.  Once in office, however, he becomes a dictator, among other things, putting his enemies in concentration camps.
subjects: American fiction (fictional works by one author)
